text: (4) Angel funds shall not invest in associates.
sentence_window:
(2) Investment by an angel fund in any venture capital undertaking shall not be less than 114[twenty
five] lakh rupees and shall not exceed 115[ten crores] rupees. (3) Investment by an angel fund in the venture capital undertaking shall be locked-in for a
period of 116[one year]. (4) Angel funds shall not invest in associates. (5) Angel funds shall not invest more than twenty-five per cent of the total investments under
all its schemes in one venture capital undertaking:
notification no. G.S.R.
